nasb.text: And I saw heaven opened, and behold, a white horse, and He who sat on it is called Faithful and True, and in righteousness He judges and wages war.

esv.text: Then I saw heaven opened, and behold, a white horse! The one sitting on it is called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he judges and makes war.

cnv.text: 我觀看，見天開了。有一匹白馬，那騎馬的稱為“忠信”和“真實”；他按著公義審判和作戰。

ccb.text: 我看见天开了，有一匹白马出来，马上的骑士名叫“诚信真实”，祂凭公义审判、作战。

csbs.text: 接着，我看见天开了，看哪，有一匹白马。骑马的那一位被称为“信实的”和“真实的”；他以公义去审判、去作战。
